endpoints.name: Returns container host mapping object for a container host resource ID if an associated controller exists.
endpoints.description: Returns container host mapping object for a container host resource ID if an associated controller exists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Lists operations for the resource provider.
endpoints.description: Lists all the supported operations by the Microsoft.DevSpaces resource provider along with their description.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Lists the Azure Dev Spaces Controllers in a subscription.
endpoints.description: Lists all the Azure Dev Spaces Controllers with their properties in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Lists the Azure Dev Spaces Controllers in a resource group.
endpoints.description: Lists all the Azure Dev Spaces Controllers with their properties in the specified resource group and subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.description: Gets the properties for an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.description: Creates an Azure Dev Spaces Controller with the specified create parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.description: Deletes an existing Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Updates an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of an existing Azure Dev Spaces Controller with the specified update parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Lists connection details for an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.description: Lists connection details for the underlying container resources of an Azure Dev Spaces Controller.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
